description: Open toed, grey sports sandals with blue accents and Velcro closuresSynthetic upper with stitched detail and overlays, has a strap across the forefoot connected to the midfoot strap and backfoot strap, secured by Velcro closures, multiple branding and cut-out detail on the sidesTextured and patterned footbedTextured outsole with patterned groovesWarranty: 3 months
